final_prompt.prompt:
Create a brand promotional poster for RAN QIU with a warm autumnal, poetic, and serene visual experience.

Style/medium: needs an 东方美学 minimalist aesthetic with natural poetry and warmth — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: needs generous negative space with shallow depth-of-field framing — exact framing is yours
Subject: must include the RAN QIU brand wordmark as focal anchor, combined with natural autumnal elements
Scene/backdrop: needs a warm autumn atmosphere — exact scene composition is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a golden-hour, warm and healing atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must use #8B3A1E (深秋棕红), #E8DCCB (米色), #D4A574 (金棕色) as the dominant palette
Materials/textures: needs a warm, organic surface treatment — exact texture and grain are yours
Text (verbatim): must include "RAN QIU"
Constraints: must preserve generous 留白, warm tones, and poetic-serene visual language throughout
Avoid:
